title: Man dies in suspected explosion at Bedford industrial unit
description: Police say three others are taken to hospital following the incident in Bedford.
content:
A man has died and three others have been injured following an incident at an industrial unit.
Bedfordshire Police was called to reports of a suspected explosion at the unit off Brunel Road in Bedford, at about 15:50 BST.

title: Burnham tells Swinney independence is 'off limits' at Glasgow Commonwealth Games meeting
description: The heads of the UK, Scottish and Welsh governments came together ahead of the opening of the Glasgow Commonwealth Games.
content:
Prime Minister Andy Burnham has met the Scottish and Welsh first ministers ahead of the start of the 2026 Commonwealth Games.
Burnham spoke to John Swinney and Rhun ap Iorwerth at a series of face-to-face meetings in Glasgow.

title: Ukraine's ousted defence chief rejects Zelensky's job offer
description: Mykhailo Fedorov refuses President Zelensky's offer to accept an alternative post, as the battle of wills continues.
content:
Ukraine's ousted defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov has refused to accept an alternative post in Volodymyr Zelensky's government, insisting he wants his job back.
He thanked the president, but said there were "only three positions in the state - in ad... [2630 chars]

title: Houthi attacks raise fears of wider Middle East conflict and more global economic damage
description: The Iran-backed group in Yemen has threatened to target Saudi vessels in a vital shipping route.
content:
Yemen's Houthi fighters claim to have attacked shipping in the Red Sea - a move that threatens to further escalate the already volatile situation in the Middle East.

title: Southport killer Axel Rudakubana moved to Broadmoor psychiatric hospital
description: Exclusive: Clinical assessments concluded Rudakubana could not be safely managed in prison, sources say
content:
The Southport killer Axel Rudakubana has been moved from prison to a psychiatric hospital after an assessment by psychiatrists, the Guardian can disclose.
He was transferred to Broadmoor high-security hospital from the category A prison Belmarsh this... [4324 chars]
